ItacPersonItem.Notes: Not listed by Maylender as a member of the Riaccesi Academy in Palermo. For Maia`s affiliation to the Riaccesi see Francesco Ambrosio MaiaLe Muse D`Oreto, Palermo, Bisagni, 1651; Francesco Ambrosio Maia, Le Preggiate Ninfe D`Oreto, Palermo, Bua, 1651
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
